title: Event payload: run_completed (v0.1)
description: Payload shape for run_completed events. Carried inside the envelope's 'payload' field. Marks the termination of an agent run (success, failure, cancellation, or timeout).

runId.description: MUST match the runId of the corresponding run_started event. The run_started event SHOULD appear in this event's envelope causality.parents.

status.description: Terminal status of the run. The spec defines four canonical values: 'succeeded', 'failed', 'cancelled', 'timed_out'. The enumeration is OPEN — implementers MAY use other values, and validators MUST NOT reject solely on unknown values (per ADR 0005).

summary.description: Human- or machine-readable outcome summary. Open shape.

metrics.description: Counters and measurements: token usage, duration, tool-call count, retries, etc. Open keys — implementers choose. Typical fields: 'durationMs', 'inputTokens', 'outputTokens', 'toolCallCount'.

finalOutput.description: The agent's final output to the initiator. Open shape, any JSON type.

error.description: Structured error information. SHOULD be present when 'status' indicates failure ('failed', 'timed_out'). Typical fields: 'type', 'code', 'message', 'stack'. Open shape.
